task.json metadata line 18, corroborated by verifier.py lines 86-107 checking has_math_domain/has_language_domain/has_science_domain/has_games_domain, and export_result.sh lines 70-73 setting these flags, and README.md lines 16-19 describing the four required domains

privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to role-play as a Child Development Psychologist and navigate the GCompris educational software to complete activities across four distinct cognitive domains: mathematical reasoning (Math/Numbers category), language and literacy (Language/ABC category), scientific inquiry (Science/Experiment sub-tab), and spatial/logical thinking (Games category). Upon completing these activities, the agent must write a multi-domain developmental assessment battery report to /home/ga/Desktop/developmental_assessment_battery.txt. The report must be at least 500 bytes and contain documented findings from all four domains. The task is verified against the setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py implementation scripts, which consistently enforce these specifications.
